languages.text: "Я отправлюсь на поиски меча, а вам в это время необходимо отыскать способ добраться до Тразина. Когда я заполучу клинок, мы дадим бой ксеносу, и на его нечестивую голову обрушится мощь Багряной пляски Кхейна! Авгуры уже просканировали палаты и сообщат вам координаты места, где мы должны воссоединиться. Если же я не вернусь в означенное время — отправляйтесь без меня".

"I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Crimson Dance of Khaine upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates where we will reunite. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."
languages.original_text: "Я отправлюсь на поиски меча, а вам в это время необходимо отыскать способ добраться до Тразина. Когда я заполучу клинок, мы дадим бой ксеносу, и на его нечестивую голову обрушится мощь Багряной пляски Кхейна! Авгуры уже просканировали палаты и сообщат вам координаты места, где мы должны воссоединиться. Если же я не вернусь в означенное время — отправляйтесь без меня".

traits.locale_text: "I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Bloody-Handed Fury upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates of our meeting point. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."

"I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Bloody-Handed Fury upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates of our meeting point. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."

"I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Crimson Dance of Khaine upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates where we will reunite. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."

"I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Crimson Dance of Khaine upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates where we will reunite. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."

languages.text: "Ich werde mich auf die Suche nach dem Schwert machen. Findet Ihr einstweilen einen Weg, zu Trazyn zu gelangen. Sobald ich die Klinge habe, werde ich den Kampf zu dem Xenos tragen und die Macht des Blutroten Tanzes von Khaine auf seinen unheiligen Schädel niedergehen lassen! Die Auguren haben die Kammern bereits untersucht und geben Euch die Koordinaten, an denen wir uns wiedersehen werden. Bin ich zum vereinbarten Zeitpunkt nicht dort, macht ohne mich weiter."
languages.original_text: "I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Crimson Dance of Khaine upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates where we will reunite. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde mich auf die Suche nach dem Schwert machen. Findet Ihr einstweilen einen Weg, zu Trazyn zu gelangen. Sobald ich die Klinge habe, werde ich den Kampf zu dem Xenos tragen und die Macht des Blutroten Tanzes von Khaine auf seinen unheiligen Schädel niedergehen lassen! Die Auguren haben die Kammern bereits untersucht und geben Euch die Koordinaten, an denen wir uns wiedersehen werden. Bin ich zum vereinbarten Zeitpunkt nicht dort, macht ohne mich weiter."

languages.text: « Je vais partir à la recherche de l'épée. Pendant ce temps, vous devrez trouver un moyen d'atteindre Trazyn. Lorsque l'arme sera entre mes mains, nous combattrons le xénos et déchaînerons toute la puissance de la Danse écarlate de Khaine sur son crâne impie ! Les augures ont déjà scanné les salles et vous donneront les coordonnées de notre point de rendez-vous. Si je ne suis pas là le moment venu, procédez sans moi. »
languages.original_text: "I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Crimson Dance of Khaine upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates where we will reunite. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais partir à la recherche de l'épée. Pendant ce temps, vous devrez trouver un moyen d'atteindre Trazyn. Lorsque l'arme sera entre mes mains, nous combattrons le xénos et déchaînerons toute la puissance de la Danse écarlate de Khaine sur son crâne impie ! Les augures ont déjà scanné les salles et vous donneront les coordonnées de notre point de rendez-vous. Si je ne suis pas là le moment venu, procédez sans moi. »

languages.text: «Partiré a buscar la espada. Mientras tanto, usted debe encontrar la forma de dar con Trazyn. Cuando tenga el arma, ¡nos enfrentaremos al xenos y desataremos el poder de la Danza Carmesí de Khaine contra su impía figura! Los augures ya han escaneado las cámaras y le proporcionarán las coordenadas en las que nos reuniremos. Si no he vuelto en el tiempo designado, continúe sin mí».
languages.original_text: "I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Crimson Dance of Khaine upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates where we will reunite. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."

traits.locale_text: «Partiré a buscar la espada. Mientras tanto, usted debe encontrar la forma de dar con Trazyn. Cuando tenga el arma, ¡nos enfrentaremos al xenos y desataremos el poder de la Danza Carmesí de Khaine contra su impía figura! Los augures ya han escaneado las cámaras y le proporcionarán las coordenadas en las que nos reuniremos. Si no he vuelto en el tiempo designado, continúe sin mí».

languages.text: "Kılıcı aramak üzere yola çıkacağım. Bu sırada sen de Trazyn'e ulaşmanın bir yolunu bulmalısın. Kılıcı ele geçirdiğimde zenoya savaş açacak ve Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nın kudretiyle onun iğrenç kafasını parçalayacağız! Alametler odaları taradı, sana yeniden bir araya geleceğimiz koordinatları verecekler. Belirtilen zamanda dönmezsem bensiz devam et."
languages.original_text: "I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Crimson Dance of Khaine upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates where we will reunite. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."

traits.locale_text: "Kılıcı aramak üzere yola çıkacağım. Bu sırada sen de Trazyn'e ulaşmanın bir yolunu bulmalısın. Kılıcı ele geçirdiğimde zenoya savaş açacak ve Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nın kudretiyle onun iğrenç kafasını parçalayacağız! Alametler odaları taradı, sana yeniden bir araya geleceğimiz koordinatları verecekler. Belirtilen zamanda dönmezsem bensiz devam et."

languages.text: “我将出发去寻找那把剑。与此同时，你必须设法找到特拉金。一旦我拿到剑，我们将向异形发起战斗，将‘凯恩的猩红之舞’的威能倾泻在他那亵渎的头颅上！俄歇矩阵已经扫描了那些厅室，会把我们会合地点的坐标发给你。如果我未能在约定时间返回，你们就继续行动，不必等我。”
languages.original_text: "I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Crimson Dance of Khaine upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates where we will reunite. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."

traits.locale_text: “我将出发去寻找那把剑。与此同时，你必须设法找到特拉金。一旦我拿到剑，我们将向异形发起战斗，将‘凯恩的猩红之舞’的威能倾泻在他那亵渎的头颅上！俄歇矩阵已经扫描了那些厅室，会把我们会合地点的坐标发给你。如果我未能在约定时间返回，你们就继续行动，不必等我。”

languages.text: 「私は剣を探しに出かけます。その間、あなたはトラズンへの行き方を考えなければなりません。剣を手に入れたら、異種族と戦って、彼の不浄な頭上にカインの紅舞の力を解放しましょう！予言者たちはすでに部屋を調べ、我々が再会する座標を伝えてくれます。もし指定された時間に私が戻らなければ、私を待たずに進んでください。」
languages.original_text: "I will set out to search for the sword. In the meantime, you must find a way to get to Trazyn. Once I have the blade, we will give battle to the xenos and unleash the might of the Crimson Dance of Khaine upon his unholy head! The augurs have already scanned the chambers and will give you the coordinates where we will reunite. If I am not back at the designated time, go on without me."

traits.locale_text: 「私は剣を探しに出かけます。その間、あなたはトラズンへの行き方を考えなければなりません。剣を手に入れたら、異種族と戦って、彼の不浄な頭上にカインの紅舞の力を解放しましょう！予言者たちはすでに部屋を調べ、我々が再会する座標を伝えてくれます。もし指定された時間に私が戻らなければ、私を待たずに進んでください。」
